title: AL's Boss Rush x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes AL's Boss Rush compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
![AL's Boss Rush logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01e2479dcdadb8688891dcfe7c5c1a343aef0b62.png)

# 

This pack makes AL's Boss Rush compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Yi-bHjJ9aB4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Since AL's Boss Rush uses a custom model for it's Guardians and Elder Guardians, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.

This pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

 

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

Also note that, as of right now, only the Guardian and Elder Guardian are animated by FA so the Ender Dragon and Wither are the same as the non-FA version.

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations
